## Vertiv Rack Transfer Switch

Power redundancy without interruption - automatic failover in 4-8ms. The Vertiv Rack Transfer Switch ensures continuous power to critical IT equipment by automatically switching between two power sources during utility failures, preventing downtime and protecting mission-critical systems.

### Key Benefits

- **UNINTERRUPTED POWER:** Automatic failover in just 4-8ms ensures critical systems never experience power interruption during utility transitions.
- **SIMPLE DEPLOYMENT:** Easy installation in standard racks without complex configuration or additional infrastructure.
- **ENHANCED RELIABILITY:** Redundant power architecture protects against single points of failure in power distribution.
- **AUTOMATIC OPERATION:** No manual intervention required - the switch detects power failures and transfers seamlessly.
- **COST-EFFECTIVE:** More affordable than dual-corded equipment solutions while providing similar redundancy benefits.

### How It Works

The Rack Transfer Switch monitors two independent power sources and automatically switches to the backup source when the primary source fails. The rapid 4-8ms failover time is fast enough to prevent most IT equipment from detecting the power transition, ensuring uninterrupted operation.

### Ideal Applications

- Single-corded critical IT equipment requiring power redundancy
- Edge computing deployments with limited space for dual power supplies
- Remote branch offices without on-site IT staff
- Legacy systems that cannot be upgraded to dual-power configurations
- Mission-critical applications requiring maximum uptime

### Key Features

- **Rapid Failover:** 4-8ms automatic switching time
- **Dual Input Monitoring:** Continuously monitors both power sources
- **Zero Downtime:** Seamless transition prevents equipment shutdown
- **Compact Design:** Fits in standard 1U rack space
- **Visual Indicators:** LED status displays for easy monitoring
- **Manual Override:** Ability to manually select power source when needed
- **Plug-and-Play:** Minimal configuration required for deployment

### Installation Benefits

- Simple mounting brackets included for quick installation
- Compatible with standard rack PDU configurations
- No specialized training required for deployment
- Works with existing power infrastructure

The Vertiv Rack Transfer Switch is the ideal solution for organizations needing power redundancy without the cost and complexity of upgrading all equipment to dual-corded configurations.
